hero.title: E-WASTE HACKATHON 2026
hero.subtitle: Innovate. Create. Sustain.
hero.description: Join us for 48 hours of innovation where the brightest minds come together to tackle the growing challenge of electronic waste.

about.title: About the Hackathon
about.description: The E-Waste Hackathon is a 48-hour event bringing together developers, designers, environmentalists, and entrepreneurs to build innovative solutions for electronic waste management. Participants will work in teams to create prototypes that address real-world e-waste challenges.

timeline.description: Sign up and form your team. Early registration is encouraged as spots are limited.
Opening ceremony, problem statements revealed, and hacking begins.
Scheduled check-ins with mentors to refine your ideas and get expert feedback.
Progress review and feedback from judges. Adjust your approach based on insights.
Final submissions and demo preparation. Present your solution to the judges.
Winners announced, prizes distributed, and closing celebration.
Winners announced, prizes distributed, and closing celebration.

company.name: GreenTech Solutions
company.description: GreenTech Solutions is a leading innovator in sustainable technology and e-waste management. Founded with the mission to reduce the environmental impact of electronic waste, we develop cutting-edge recycling technologies and circular economy solutions that give electronics a second life.
